calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Yubing Feng and YuXiu Xu; father and mother of minor.
Petitioner YuXiu Xu sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter/minor son Weibiao Feng.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor 1 from Weibiao Feng, aka Weibiao Feng Yingyi Fen to Bill Wibiao Feng. The court also grant the Petition for Name Change of minor 2 from Yingyi Feng, aka Joanna Yingyi Feng to Joanna Yingyi Feng.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
